nasb.text: They went and served other gods and worshiped them, gods whom they have not known and whom He had not allotted to them.

esv.text: and went and served other gods and worshiped them, gods whom they had not known and whom he had not allotted to them.

cnv.text: 去事奉別的神，向他們叩拜，就是他們不認識的神，也是耶和華沒有給他們指定要拜的神；

ccb.text: 去供奉、祭拜他们所不认识、并非耶和华所分派的神明。
